name: Thomas
flavor_text: "I've never seen a winter so beautiful! Look at the snow—pristine as far as the eye can see!"

name: Lilo
text: CREATIVE INSPIRATION While you have a character named Stitch in play, this character gets +1 {L}.
flavor_text: "A snow Stitch is like a snowman, but even hungrier."

name: Pudge
text: GOOD FRIEND If you have a character named Lilo in play, you can play this character for free.
flavor_text:
"How many sandwiches will I need to feed you to make all this snow melt?"
—Lilo

name: Pumbaa
text: SHAKE THINGS UP When you play this character, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavor_text:
"See? I told ya he was hardheaded!"
–Timon

name: Tiana
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character’s {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "This cocoa will warm you up like a hug from your mama."

name: Nakoma
flavor_text:
"Come sit by the fire. It will keep you warm until
this storm blows over."

name: Stitch
text: BRING YOUR FRIENDS Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other characters in play, you may draw a card.
flavor_text: "First one down the mountain gets all the marshmallows for their cocoa!" —Lilo

name: Pocahontas
text: DISCOVERY AWAITS When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.
flavor_text:
"If you don't know the way, the spirits will show you."
—Pocahontas

name: David
text: Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
flavor_text: "These snowboards are pretty sweet—and they make great shields!"

name: Fangmeyr
text: REQUEST REINFORCEMENTS When you play this character, you may return a Detective character card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: "Failure to signal, broken tail light, and taunting an officer with hot chocolate. That's gonna be a hefty fine."

name: Chief Powhatan
text:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
STANDS HIS GROUND This character can’t challenge.

name: Sarabi
text: FEARSOME SNARL {E} - Chosen opposing character gets -4 {S} until the start of your next turn.
flavor_text: A loving mother, a cunning hunter, and a fierce warrior.

name: Grandmother Willow
text: SMOOTH THE WAY Once during your turn, you pay 1 {I} less for the next character you play this turn.
flavor_text: "I haven't had this much excitement in 200 years."

name: Cobra Bubbles
text: AURA OF AUTHORITY Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character can’t challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.
flavor_text: "No, it can't wait until this storm blows over!"

name: John Smith
text: FOLLOW THE TRACKS At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted and none of your characters challenged this turn, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: "Interesting. These animal tracks lead away from the vine. But toward what?"

name: Timon
text: GET RID OF THAT When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of your choice.
flavor_text: "Okay, Pumbaa—hit it!"

name: Lilo
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lilo.)
I’LL COUNT YOU IN Whenever this character quests, you may play a character with cost 2 or less from your discard for free.

name: Pleakley
text: SIGNS OF LIFE When you play this character, if you have another Alien character in play, draw a card.
flavor_text: "Amazing! This storm has created all sorts of new life forms. I will call you 'Avis frigida.'"

name: Jumba Jookiba
text:
WELCOMING CROWD For each character you have in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
I AM HELPING Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.

name: Nani
text: THAT'S YOUR CUE When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character card with cost 2 or less and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Reuben
text: LUNCH SPECIAL {E} – Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character of yours. For each 1 damage removed this way, you pay 1 {I} less for the next character you play this turn.
flavor_text: "At least I'll be ready in case of a sandwich shortage."

name: Pocahontas
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Pocahontas.)
CALMING WORDS When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her and none of your characters challenged this turn, characters can't challenge until the start of your next turn.

name: Simba
text: YOU DON’T STAND A CHANCE When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {} until the start of your next turn.
flavor_text: Like Zazu always says, practice makes perfect!

name: Bambi
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
COME SEE! During your turn, whenever this character exerts, reveal a number of cards from the top of your deck equal to the number of cards under him. Put all revealed character cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Angel
text:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Singer 3 (This character counts as cost 3 to sing songs.)

name: Widow Tweed
text: I'VE GOT YOU When you play this character, return a character card from your discard to your hand. If that character is named Tod, you may play him for free.
flavor_text: "No, I just can't leave you out here all alone."

name: Percy
text: ICE BATH This character can’t challenge.
flavor_text:
"That's the strangest creature I've ever seen."
–Grandmother Willow

name: Raging Storm
text: Banish all characters.
flavor_text:
"The storm . . . it's too much, Lilo. We have to go back!"
–Nani

name: Akood Et Emuti
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {} to sing this song for free.)

You pay 2 {} less for the next character you play this turn.
Draw a card.
flavor_text:
Alan ot agan, atoom on ataki
Oteem-ich atooca

name: Wisdom Of The Willow
text: For the rest of this turn, whenever one of your characters quests, you may draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Ripples are so small at first, and then look how they grow.
But someone has to start them."
–Grandmother Willow

name: Ohana Means Family
text: Remove all damage from chosen character of yours. Draw a card for each 1 damage removed this way.
flavor_text:
"Family means nobody is left behind."
—Lilo

name: John Smith's Compass
text:
SPINNING ARROW At the end of your turn, if a character of yours challenged this turn, banish this item.

YOUR PATH At the end of your turn, if none of your characters challenged this turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it’s a character card with cost 3 or less or named Pocahontas, you may put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

name: Zootopia
flavor_text:
"Welcome to Tundratown. Please respect our hibernating inhabitants and keep noise to a minimum."
-Zootopia Chamber of Commerce

name: Nala
text: PLAYFUL SLIDE When you play this character, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
flavor_text: "Told ya I'd make it to the bottom first, Simba!"

name: Alice
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
MYSTICAL INSIGHT Whenever this character quests, put all cards from under her into your hand.

name: Tigger
text: SPLENDERIFFIC BOUNCE When you play this character, you may return chosen character, item, or location with cost 2 or less to their player’s hand.
flavor_text: "What do you mean, can Tiggers bounce in the snow? Just watch!"

name: Isis Vanderchill
text: CHILL OUT When you play this character, exert chosen opposing character.
flavor_text:
Darkwing: "Just cool it, lady."
Launchpad: "I think you might want to rephrase that, DW."

name: Flit
text: LOOK OUT! When you play this character, move up to 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

name: Morgana Macawber
flavor_text:
"Sometimes I don't even know whose side you're on," Darkwing said.

"The same side I've always been on," Morgana replied.
"Mine."

name: Rabbit
text: Challenger +3 (While challenging, this character gets +3 {S}.)
flavor_text: "Not another step. I've got a shovel full of snow, and I'm not afraid to use it!"

name: Pocahontas
text: WHAT IS MY PATH? Whenever this character quests, gain lore equal to another chosen exerted character's {L}.
flavor_text:
"She has her mother's spirit. She goes wherever the wind takes her."
–Kekata

name: Darkwing Duck
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)
flavor_text: "I am the terrier that yaps in the night. I am the schnauzer that digs up your petunias. I am Darkwolf Dog!"

name: Taran
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.) WEAKEN THE CAULDRON When you play this character, put up to 2 cards from chosen player's discard on the bottom of their deck in any order.

name: Eeyore
text:
THANKS FOR NOTICIN' ME For each exerted character in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
SORRY ABOUT THAT When you play this character, for each opposing player, you may choose a character of theirs. They can't ready at the start of their next turn.

name: Meeko
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

BOTTOMLESS PIT At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, choose and discard a card or banish him.

name: Morgana Macawber
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Morgana Macawber.)
JUST FOR YOU When you play this character, you may choose an opposing character and move 1 damage from each other character to them.

name: Tinker Bell
text:
FLURRY OF DELIGHT While you have 4 or more cards in your hand, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
SPECTACULAR FIND While you have 7 or more cards in your hand, this character gets +3 {L}.

name: Genie
text: Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.) INCREASING WISDOM This character gets +1 {L} for each card under him.

name: Anna
text: UNUSUAL TRANSFORMATION If a card left a player's discard this turn, this card gains Shift 0 {}. (You may pay 0 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Anna.) WARM HEART Whenever this character quests, you may gain lore equal to the {} of a character card in your discard. If you do, put that card on the bottom of your deck.

name: Kristoff
text:
HIDDEN DEPTHS When you play this character, if you have a character named Anna in play, you may put a card from chosen player’s discard on the bottom of their deck.

STROKE OF LUCK Once during your turn, whenever a card leaves your discard, draw a card.

name: Anna
text: UNEXPECTED DISCOVERY When you play this character, you may put a card from chosen player's discard on the bottom of their deck.
flavor_text: Even in the deep forest, Anna could see the vine poking above the treetops.

name: Marshmallow
text: ICY BLAST Whenever this character quests, each opponent can’t ready more than 1 of their characters at the start of their next turn.
flavor_text: "GO AWAY!"

name: Space Cows
flavor_text:
"The cows are not what they seem."
-Launchpad

name: Christopher Robin
text: UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
flavor_text: The air was crisp and clear. "A perfect morning for a snowball fight," said Christopher Robin.

name: Lumpy
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "Wheee! This is even more fun than a game of leaplog!"

name: Witches Of Morva
text: QUITE A BARGAIN When you play this character, you may return another chosen character of yours to your hand. If you do, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: What are you willing to give up in exchange for power?

name: Heihei
text: HE'S BACK! When this character is banished in a challenge, return this card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: More powerful. More beautiful. More Heihei.

name: Pua
flavor_text:
"Don't worry, buddy. We're going to have fun today, I promise!"
—Moana

name: Sven
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)
Challenger +3 (While challenging, this character gets +3 {S}.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Do You Want To Build A Snowman?
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen opponent chooses YES! or NO!:
• YES! You gain 3 lore.
• NO! They choose a character of theirs and put that card on the bottom of their deck.

name: Come Out And Fight!
text: Put all cards from under chosen character, item, or location on the bottom of their player's deck in a random order. Draw a card.
flavor_text:
Mickey: "All right, let's get that ghost!"
Goofy: "How do you reckon we do that?"

name: Swordplay
text: Chosen character gains Challenger +3 this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text:
"It takes a great hero to handle a sword like this!"
—Taran

name: Colors Of The Wind
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Each player reveals the top card of their deck. Draw a card for each different ink type of cards revealed this way.

name: Mother's Necklace
text: PRECIOUS GIFT At the end of your turn, if none of your characters challenged this turn, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
flavor_text:
"It's more than a necklace—it's a connection to her past."
—Chief Powhatan

name: Mystical Inkcaster
text: SPECIAL SUMMONS {E}, 3 {I} - Play a character with cost 5 or less for free. They gain Rush. At the end of your turn, banish them. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text:
"We need your help. Show us what you've got."
–Shanzay, an Illumineer

name: Pot Of Honey
text: I'M STUCK! Banish this item – Chosen exerted character can't ready at the start of their next turn.
flavor_text: "Oh, bother. Not again . . . again."

name: The Frost Vine
text: PERSISTENT PROBLEM When this location is banished, if there was an exerted character here, return this card from your discard to your hand.

name: Mulan
text: RIGOROUS TRAINING Whenever this character quests, gain lore equal to her {S}, to a maximum of 6 lore.
flavor_text:
"Now remember, it's your first day of training, so listen to your teacher and no fightin', play nice with the other kids..."
—Mushu

name: Stitch
text: I DARE YOU! {E} — Chosen opposing character gains Reckless until the start of your next turn. (They can't quest and must challenge if able.)
flavor_text: "Hi."

name: Big Mama
text: Ward (Opponents can’t choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "Gather 'round, little ones. Let Big Mama teach you how to stay warm in the snow!"

name: Minnie Mouse
flavor_text: She's the epitome of grace, beauty, and a whole lot of fun.

name: Yao
text: OOH, I'M SCARED During opponents' turns, this character gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
flavor_text: In his mind, he was "Snow-General Yoo," surveying his frozen lands from atop his icy fortress.

name: Chien-po
flavor_text: "Stay right here, little snowball. I'll come get you when it's time for your date with Ling's face."

name: Ling
text: BUILDING MUSCLES 1 {I} — Chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "If I keep carrying these, I'll be as strong as Chien-Po!"

name: Boomer
text: SPOTTED HIM! When you play this character, you may exert chosen damaged character.
flavor_text:
"Good work, Boomer. We'll get him this time."
–Dinky

name: Chernabog
text: DARK DANCE When you play this character, you may shuffle chosen opposing character into their player’s deck. If you do, that player may play a character from their discard for free.

name: Dinky
text: GET HIM! When you play this character, each opponent chooses one of their characters and deals 1 damage to them.
flavor_text: "Nail him, Boomer! Sock it to him!"

name: Stegmutt
text:
WAKE OF DESTRUCTION For each item card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
COLLATERAL DAMAGE When you play this character, you may put 3 item cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you do, deal 3 damage to chosen character.

name: Squeaks
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text:
"Snug as a bug, while we're out here freezin' our b-b-beaks off!"
–Boomer

name: Aladdin
text: QUICK ON HIS FEET Whenever you play an action, this character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Mushu
text: SNOWY SURPRISE When you play this character, deal 2 damage to chosen character.
flavor_text: "You want a snowball? I'll give you a snowball. I'll give you the biggest snowball you've ever seen!"

name: Goofy
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
GRAVE OUTCOME When this character is banished, each opponent chooses and discards a card for each card that was under him.

name: Copper
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Copper.)
MORE TO EXPLORE Whenever this character quests, your characters with Evasive get +1 {L} this turn.

name: Copper
text: FOUND YA When you play this character, chosen player reveals their hand.
flavor_text:
"How's this for a huntin' dog? He's just a little runt now, but he'll grow."
—Amos Slade

name: Vixey
text:
SHOWIN' UP If you have a character named Tod in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Tod
flavor_text:
"Come on, now. I'm not going to harm you."
–Widow Tweed

name: Minnie Mouse
text:
Ward (Opponents can’t choose this character except to challenge.)

A MOTHER’S LOVE When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost. If you do, draw a card.

name: White Rabbit
text:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Tod
text:
LOOK AT THIS! Whenever this character quests, choose one:
• Gain 1 lore.
• Chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Mickey Mouse
text: SLIPPERY SLOPE When you play this character and when he leaves play, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavor_text: "Now, that's what I call shredding!"

name: Tod
text:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tod.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
IMPRESSIVE LEAPS Twice during your turn, whenever this character is chosen for an action or an item’s ability, you may ready him.

name: Donald Duck
text:
SPIRIT OF GIVING Whenever you use the Boost ability of a character, you may put the top card of your deck under them facedown.

WELL WISHES During opponents’ turns, whenever one of your other characters is banished, you may draw a card for each card that was under them.

name: Strike A Good Match
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
flavor_text:
Please bring honor to us
Please bring honor to us all

name: Snowball Fight
text: Each opponent chooses and discards a card. If you have a character with Evasive in play, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text:
"Snowflakes compacted into sphere makes for excellent projectile."
—Jumba Jookiba

name: Freeze The Vine
text: Banish all locations. Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
flavor_text: "There's only one way to stop this vine. Wait, no . . . It's full of mixed ink? There's too much! I can't control it!"

name: Education Or Elimination
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Choose one:
• Draw a card. Chosen character of yours gets +1 {L} and gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
• Banish chosen damaged character.

name: Snow Fort
text:
THE HIGH GROUND Your characters get +1 {S}.
BARRICADE During opponents’ turns, your characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

name: Rafiki's Bakora Staff
text:
READ THE OMENS {E}, 1 {I} - Draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
BONK! 1 {I}, Banish this item - Deal 1 damage to chosen character.

name: Retro Evolution Device
text: TURN INTO DINOSAUR {E}, 1 {I}, Banish chosen character of yours – Play a character with cost up to 2 more than the banished character for free.
flavor_text:
"It's great for reheating leftovers, and it turns people into dinosaurs."
—Stegmutt

name: Battering Ram
text:
FULL FORCE {E} - Deal 1 damage to chosen damaged character.

BREAK THROUGH {E}, Banish this item - Banish chosen location.
flavor_text: There's a right tool for every job.

name: Wreck-it Ralph
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
POWERED UP This character gets +1 {S} for each card under him.
WHO'S COMIN' WITH ME? When this character is banished, banish all characters with {S} equal to or less than the {S} he had in play.

name: Scrooge Mcduck
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
COUNTING COINS This character gets +1 {S} and +1 {W} for each card under him.
flavor_text: This grim future is but one possibility.

name: Donald Duck
flavor_text:
Bob Cratchit: "That Fred, always so full of kindness."
Ebenezer Scrooge: "Aye, he always was a little peculiar."

name: Taurus Bulba
flavor_text:
"Looks like Taurus Bulba's new computer brain has
the same old disposition."
–Launchpad

name: Copper
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavor_text: "I won't get lost, Chief. I can smell my way back."

name: Mulan
text:
NOBLE SPIRIT If you have a character in play with damage, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
FIGHTING SPIRIT If you have a character in play with 5 {S} or more, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.

name: Maui
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)
flavor_text: "This has to be worth at least three chee hoos!"

name: Fa Zhou
text: BATTLE WOUND This character enters play with 2 damage.
flavor_text: It had been his duty and his honor to serve the Empire.

name: Liquidator
text:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you’re not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Reckless (This character can’t quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

name: Elisa Maza
text:
FOREVER STRONG Your characters’ {S} can’t be reduced below their printed value.
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can’t ready.
flavor_text: "I'll never get the hang of jumping off rooftops."

name: Iduna
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "Oh, dear. Look at the ice! Do you think this means . . . ?"

name: Agnarr
text: PROTECTIVE INSTINCT While you have a Queen character in play, this character gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text: "It's just as we feared."

name: Negaduck
flavor_text:
"Only someone so dastardly, so despicable, so disdainful of the utterly defenseless would dare perform such a deed!"
–Darkwing Duck

name: Negaduck
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Negaduck.)
STICKY FINGERS Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

name: Hercules
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
SUPERHUMAN STRENGTH While there’s a card under this character, he gets +3 {S}.

name: Beast
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they’re played.)
DYNAMIC MANEUVER Whenever this character challenges, if he’s at a location, he takes no damage from the challenge.

name: Slushy
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text:
"All right, Slushy. Do your stuff."
–Lilo

name: Goofy
text: PREPARE YOURSELF When you play this character, you may ready chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavor_text: "Tonight, you will be visited by three spirits. Listen to 'em."

name: Goofy
text: YAAAAAAA-HOO-HOO-HOO-HOOEY {E}, Banish this character - Banish chosen character.
flavor_text:
"Skiing really is quite simple, once you get the hang of it."
-Narrator

name: Olaf
text:
ABOUT TIME! For each action card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
CHAOTIC COLLISION When you play this character, each opponent loses 2 lore.

name: Elsa
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Elsa.)
ENDLESS WINTER When you play this character and whenever you play a location, you may exert chosen character with 3 {S} or less.
DISTANT CALL While this character is at a location, she gets +3 {L}.

name: Scrooge Mcduck
text:
PAYMENT DUE Whenever this character quests, each opponent loses 1 lore. Draw a card for each 1 lore lost this way.

FORECLOSURE At the end of your turn, if an opponent has 0 lore, you gain 1 lore.

name: Elsa
text: CLEAR THE WAY When you play this character, you pay 2 {I} less for the next location you play this turn.
flavor_text: "The vine is worse than I thought. I'll have to take care of this myself."

name: Willie The Giant
text:
Boost 3 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 3 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
THE FOOD OF GENEROSITY This character can’t quest or challenge unless you put a card under him this turn.

name: Nani's Payback
text: Each opponent loses lore equal to the damage on chosen character of yours, to a maximum of 4 lore each. Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Older sister's wrath is even more dangerous than Hamsterviel."
–Jumba Jookiba

name: Force Of A Great Typhoon
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gets +5 {S} this turn.
flavor_text:
Once you find your center
You are sure to win

name: Marching off to Battle
text: If a character was banished this turn, draw 2 cards.

name: The Cold Never Bothered Me
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a location card and put it into your hand. Put the rest into your discard. You pay 3 {I} less for the next location you play this turn.

name: Grab Your Bow
text:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Banish up to 2 chosen characters with 2 {S} or less.

name: Lonely Grave
text: HAUNTING PRESENCE {E}, Banish chosen character of yours – Put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.
flavor_text: A frightening prospect for the richest man in town.

name: Kristoff's Lute
text: MOMENT OF INSPIRATION {E}, 2 {I} - Reveal the top card of your deck. You may play it as if it were in your hand. Otherwise, put it in your discard.
flavor_text:
"A little music and a campfire is the best way to keep warm in winter . . . well, mostly the campfire."
-Kristoff

name: Stitch
text:
SCROOGE… McDuck
Pay 1 {} to play this action for free.
(You can’t reduce the cost of actions by more than 2 {})

name: Graveyard of Christmas Future
text:
NEW ARRIVAL Whenever you move a character here, put the top card of your deck under this location facedown.
ANOTHER CHANCE At the start of your turn, you may put all cards from under this location into your hand. If you do, banish this location.

name: Beast's Castle
text: SNOWBALL STANDOFF Whenever a character here challenges another character, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: While the flowers slept, something else began to bloom.

name: Roo
text: HOPPING IN {E} – Put this character facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.
flavor_text: "Look, Mama—the icy magic is going away! Aren't the flowers pretty?"

name: Kanga
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
EXTRA HELP While there’s a card under this character, she gets +1 {L}.

name: Piglet
flavor_text: "I've always thought," said Pooh, "that sometimes the smallest things are the best."

name: Mickey Mouse
flavor_text:
Tiny Tim loves seeing the Christmas decorations at
the Winter Festival. His father, Bob Cratchit, loves
every chance to spend time with him.

name: Minnie Mouse
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: She's always ready with a warm plate and a warm heart.

name: Sina
text: Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavor_text: Sometimes, people just need to know there's someone watching over them.

name: Honker Muddlefoot
text: BE CAREFUL! Your characters named Darkwing Duck gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text:
"It's clear you're the brains of this operation, Honker."
–Darkwing Duck

name: Daisy Duck
flavor_text:
"You loved your gold more than that precious
creature. And you lost her forever."
–Ghost of Christmas Past, to Scrooge

name: Darkwing Duck
text: Ward (Opponents can’t choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "The noble visage of one of history's greatest detectives, carved by one of history's other greatest detectives: me."

name: Jiminy Cricket
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
LOOK INTO YOUR PAST Whenever you put a card under this character, you may put a card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Piglet
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Piglet.)
SPECIAL RECIPE At the end of your turn, remove up to 2 damage from each of your characters.

name: Gramma Tala
text: ANCESTORS’ GIFT For each card in your inkwell, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
flavor_text: "Ice fishing? No, no–this is ice feeding!"

name: Gosalyn Mallard
text: KEEN GEAR When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal an item card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Darkwing Duck
text: MODERN MARVEL Whenever this character quests, you may put an item card from your discard on the bottom of your deck. If you do, you may play an item with cost 5 or less from your discard for free.
flavor_text: "I've got things in here that haven't even been tested yet!"

name: Winnie The Pooh
text: LOOKING FOR A MORSEL When you play this character, you may return an item card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: "Oh, bother! Empty again!"

name: Scrooge Mcduck
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Scrooge McDuck.)
SPREADING JOY When you play this character, you may put a card from the top of your deck facedown under each of your other characters. If you do, those characters gain Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can’t choose them except to challenge.)

name: Splatter Phoenix
text:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

name: Pete
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
FOREBODING GLANCE Whenever this character quests, look at a number of cards from the top of your deck equal to the number of cards under him. Put one into your hand and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Moana
text: ANCESTRAL LEGACY You can ink cards from your discard.
flavor_text: "I've never seen anything like this before! It's so dazzling, so beautiful. So . . . cold."

name: Tamatoa
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
ANYTHING THAT GLITTERS Whenever you put a card under one of your characters or locations, this character gets +1 {L} this turn.

name: Morty Fieldmouse
text:
HOLIDAY SPIRIT Once during your turn, whenever you put a card under one of your other characters, put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.
HOLIDAY CHEER This character gets +1 {L} for each card under him.

name: Belle
text: WINTER STOCKPILE Whenever one of your characters is banished, you may put that card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: What the Beast didn't know was that her father had taught her how to throw a perfect snowball.

name: Mickey Mouse
text:
HARD WORK Whenever this character quests, put the top card of your deck facedown under him.

A GIVING HEART When this character is banished in a challenge, you may put all cards that were under him under another chosen character or location of yours.

name: Scrooge Mcduck
text: BAH, HUMBUG During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, chosen character gets -1 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "You work all your life to get money, and people want you to give it away."

name: Chief Tui
text: AND THEN... Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavor_text: "And still a spark of hope burned in their hearts . . ."

name: Visiting Christmas Past
text: Put any number of cards from under your characters and locations into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text:
"What's wrong, Scrooge? I thought you enjoyed looking down on the world!"
—The Ghost of Christmas Past

name: Let It Go
text:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Put chosen character into their player’s inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Distract
text: Chosen character gets -2 {S} this turn. Draw a card.
flavor_text: "Be off with you, spirits! Can't a man enjoy his meal in peace?"

name: Wipe Out!
text: Put chosen character with Bodyguard or item into their player’s inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Blue Smoke
text:
THEATRICAL ENTRANCE If you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this item.
CLOUD OF MYSTERY {E}, 1 {I}, Banish this item – Chosen character gains Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

name: Tiny Tim's Crutch
text: AT YOUR SIDE {E} - Chosen character gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text:
"We all need a little help from time to time."
–Mrs. Cratchit

name: Darkwing's Chair Set
text:
SECRET ENTRANCE When you play this item, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
SUDDEN SPIN {E}, Banish this item — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character. If a character named Darkwing Duck is chosen, remove up to 4 damage instead.

name: Darkwing's Gas Device
text: BLINDING CLOUD {E},1 {I} — Chosen character gets -1 {S} this turn. If you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play, chosen character gets -2 {S} this turn instead.

name: Hidden Trap
text:
ALMOST READY This item enters play exerted.

SNAP! {E}, Banish this item – Choose one:
• Banish chosen item.
• Chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

name: Rapunzel
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
CLONK! Whenever this character quests, if there’s a card under her, chosen opposing character can’t challenge until the start of your next turn.

name: Launchpad
text: STAND GUARD Your locations gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "No one'll crash the gate while I'm here. And I know about crashing!"

name: Prince Naveen
flavor_text:
"Achidanza! I've never been this cold in my life.
It's so . . . invigorating!"

name: Darkwing Duck
flavor_text: "I am the terror that flaps in the night! I am the chill that runs up your spine! I am Darkwing Duck."

name: Li Shang
text: Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {}.)
flavor_text: "My father was strict and stern, but he made me who I am."

name: Gantu
text: EASY TARGET When you play this character, choose and discard a card.
flavor_text: "I'd better be getting paid for this."

name: Launchpad
text: WHAT DID YOU NEED? {E} - Draw a card. Then, choose and discard a card unless you have a character named Darkwing Duck in play.
flavor_text:
"Excuse my sidekick. His brain seems to be having an out-of-body experience."
– Darkwing Duck

name: Donald Duck
text: COMIN’ THROUGH! When you play this character, you may banish chosen item.
flavor_text: "Where are the brakes on this doggone thing?!"

name: Chief
text: GOOD RIDDANCE {E} - If an opposing character was banished in a challenge this turn, draw a card.
flavor_text: "Sonny, you've got a lot of learnin' to do about a-sniffin' and a-smellin'."

name: Amos Slade
text: Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavor_text:
"I heard two of them foxes skitterin' about.
Shouldn't be long now . . ."

name: Mchorn
text: Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
flavor_text: "If this storm keeps up, every neighborhood will be like Tundratown."

name: Duke Weaselton
text: APPREHENDED When this character is banished, you may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.
flavor_text: "Who'd you go and do that for?"

name: Li Shang
text: Shift 4 {} (You may pay 4 {} to play this on top of one of your characters named Li Shang.)
flavor_text:
"The best way I can honor my father's memory is
to finish his fight."

name: Nani
text: TAKE IT EASY While this character has no damage, she gets +1 {L}.
flavor_text:
"For a warming winter tea, add the following Lorcana spices to your cup: frosted peppercorns, silver cardamom, wishing star anise."
–Hana's Herbarium

name: Stitch
text: AMPED UP While you have a character named Lilo in play, this character gains Challenger +3. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text:
"No more caffeine for you."
—Lilo

name: Dr. Hamsterviel
text:
CONTROLLED VARIABLES For each Alien character card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
AWESTRUCK When you play this character, chosen opposing character can’t challenge during their next turn.

name: Angela
text:
SHADOW POWER When you play this character, you may give chosen character Challenger +2 and Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (They get +2 {} while challenging. Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

ETERNAL NIGHT Your Gargoyle characters lose the Stone by Day ability.

name: Darkwing Duck
text:
Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {}.)
INSTA-ARMOR During your turn, whenever an item is banished, this character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

name: Gigi
text:
Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
SO PRETTY While this character has no damage, she gets +2 {S}.

name: Grand Councilwoman
flavor_text: "Mr. Pleakley?! Are you responsible for this snowball? You are a member of the Galactic Council—have some self-respect!"

name: Angel
text:
UNTOUCHABLE While you have no cards in your hand, this character gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
GOOD AIM Once during your turn, you may choose and discard a card to deal 2 damage to chosen character.

name: Darkwing Duck
text:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Darkwing Duck.)
TAKE THAT! During your turn, whenever an item is banished, you may pay 1 {I} to deal 2 damage to chosen character.
EVILDOERS BEWARE! This character can challenge ready Villain characters.

name: John Smith
text:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
DO YOUR WORST Opponents must choose this character for actions and abilities if able.

name: Judy Hopps
text:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you’re not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

name: Lilo
text: EXTRA LAYERS During each opponent’s turn, the first time this character would take damage, she takes no damage instead.
flavor_text: "My big dumb sister said I had to wear warm clothes, so I took ALL of them."

name: Keep The Ancient Ways
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Opponents can't play actions or items until the start of your next turn.

name: Let's Get Dangerous
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Each player shuffles their deck and then reveals the top card. Each player who reveals a character card may play that character for free. Otherwise, put the revealed cards on the bottom of their player’s deck.

name: Winterspell
text: Chosen location of yours can’t be challenged until the start of your next turn. Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Well, that backfired. Anyone know how to thaw an Illuminary?"
–Shanzay, an Illumineer

name: Nearly Indestructible
text: Chosen character of yours gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
flavor_text:
"I designed this creature for to be unstoppable."
–Jumba Jookiba

name: Infra-pink Ultra Scan Specs
text:
DETECTING EVIDENCE When you play this item, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

FOLLOW THE CLUES Banish this item – Chosen character gains Alert this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

name: Stitch
text: BRING YOUR FRIENDS Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other characters in play, you may draw a card.
flavor_text:
"First one down the mountain gets all the marshmallows for their cocoa!"
–Lilo

name: Genie
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
INCREASING WISDOM This character gets +1 {L} for each card under him.

name: Jiminy Cricket
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
LOOK INTO YOUR PAST Whenever you put a card under this character, you may put a card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Rapunzel
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
CLONK! Whenever this character quests, if there's a card under her, chosen opposing character can't challenge until the start of your next turn.

name: Eeyore
text:
THANKS FOR NOTICING ME For each exerted character in play, you pay {I} less to play this character.
SORRY ABOUT THAT When you play this character, for each opposing player, you may choose a character of theirs. They can’t ready at the start of their next turn.

name: Tod
Freeze the Vine
text: Banish all locations. Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.

name: Elsa
Pocahontas
text:
Shift 3 {}
CALMING WORDS When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her and none of your characters challenged this turn, characters can’t challenge until the start of your next turn.

name: Moana
text: ANCESTRAL LEGACY You can ink cards from your discard.
